title: EnderPearlCooldownUltra
description: Adds a Cooldown to the minecraft enderpearl. useful for pvp based servers
body:
Steps for installation

1. Download the plugin from this page
2. Locate the **Plugins** Folder in your hosting
3. Add the EnderpearlCooldown Plugin
4. Restart/Start the server

To reload the plugin without restart do
```
/epcreload
```

📜 TERMS OF SERVICE

🚫 You may NOT claim this plugin as your own

🚫 You may NOT resell or republish this plugin
